consistency.type_and_source_type_rarity: Consistent ('Wondrous item' matches the type field).

quality.description_detail: The description clearly outlines the requirement (48 hours over 6 days or fewer), the mechanical effect (+2 Strength, maximum increase), and the item depletion/recharge mechanic (loses magic, regains in a century).

mechanics.primary_effect: Permanent statistical increase (+2 to Strength score and maximum Strength score).

activation_cost.duration_constraint: Must be completed within 6 days or fewer.

mechanics.item_state_change: The manual becomes non-magical after use, with a long recharge period (1 century).
